data.body:
[Summer Sky's Wishlist Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the Summer Sky's Wishlist!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 3/1/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))

https://nexon.link/8ae
